/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MocapSlave.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MocapSlave.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/slave/src/imgProcessing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MocapSlave.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/slave/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MocapSlave.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/slave/src/receiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MocapSlave.dir/home/khanh/Programming/Thesis/Thesis_1/src/slave/src/sender.cpp.o -o MocapSlave  -lzmq /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.15.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.10.1.0
